title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
summary: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

title: Stock Rebound Sputters as Iran Risks Whipsaw Oil: Markets Wrap
summary: A Wall Street rebound sputtered as lingering worries about an escalation of the Middle East conflict whipsawed the oil market.

summary: This fund proves that the industry’s demise at the hands of artificial intelligence has been somewhat exaggerated.
